notes: West 2017, comprehensive overview of smoking health effects, cessation benefits, and interventions; ~6M premature deaths/year, 10 years life expectancy lost; 5% unaided quit success; varenicline + behavioral support >40% abstinence at 52 weeks
Jemal et al. 2024, NEJM; smoking cessation and short- and longer-term mortality; large US cohort study quantifying mortality reduction by cessation timing

Le et al. 2022, JAMA Network Open; 551,388 US adults; smokers had appreciably greater all-cause mortality vs never-smokers across all race/ethnicity/sex groups; quitting associated with significant excess mortality reduction
GBD 2021 forecasting analysis, Lancet Public Health 2024; 175M deaths and 4.30B YLLs attributed to smoking 1990-2021; elimination scenario would add 2.04B cumulative YLLs by 2050
